mechanics.text:
EQUIPMENT
changed centuries Rules for the treatment of injuries can be found in Healing; p. 123_
either draw powe by plugging into cockpit powcr jack use its internal battery; which works for Up to 48 hours_ The pack can dispense up to dozen doses of medications before needing replenishment, though these   medications must replaced at least once month whether used Or not,. medipack will deliver dose of medication each time its wearer takes wound Or gets stunned. The dose will prevent the character from being stunned ad will allow him to ignore all TN modifiers caused by Minor Wounds or less (Serious Wounds worse have their usual effects) The wound value of all wounds still counts as usual. Finally: any Knockout Checks are made with Modifier to the TN, So long as the doses have not all been used UP,
BASIC EQUIPMENT The most basic of medical equipment enough treat common injuries the case of serious and life-threatening injuries; at best these kits can be stopgap measure that can Keep person alive Iong enough for someone with advanced medical training and equipment take Over_
Medlcal Kit The personal medical kit contains enough bandages and other supplies t0 tend all minor wounds, can also be used to Keep critically wounded character alive long enough tor medic or doctor t0 tend to the wounds: character performing First Aid needs such kit to avoid Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier
Clan LSSU The Clans developed more sophisticated version Of the medipack, designated the Life Support Sustaining Unit (LSSU): Initially the L SSUs were only available t0 elementals; but Clan MechWarriors and pilots are now using this device. The Clan LSSU functions like the medipack (above), except contains twice as many doses of medication;
Advanced Medical Kit This includes more extensive array of equipment; includ- ing various drugs ad basic monitoring equipment; and can be used by combat medic t0 treat critically wounded character. character performing MedTech Skill needs such Kit t0 avoid Lack Proper Equipment Modifier.
Preserving Sleeve Medics and doctors use the preserving sleeve t0 treat seri: ous injuries to limb until full care can be given. The sleeve slipped over the injured limb and inflated, controlling any bleed: ing ad stabilizing the limb will keep Serious or Critical Wound t0 limb free from infection for Up to 36 hours (aSSUm ing the wound was initially treated successfully with First Aid to stop any bleeding). Additionally; the preserving sleeve can be set t0 apply heat cold_ sleeve will immobilize limb. venting any further damage The net effect is 2 Modifier t0 the TN of tne Surgery Skill Check to treat the wound
Medipatch Tnis specialized drugpatch that should be applied directly to wound contains several antiseptics _ painkillers and otner chemicals des Ened fignt infection and speed the healing process medipatch consumed when used and applies 2 TN Modifier t0 any First Aid or MedTech Skill Check:
Stimpatch The stimpatch another common variant of the drugpatch. It instantly introduces powerful stimulant into the blood sup ply, meant t0 help rouse person from Fatigue Or unconscious- ness_ Tne stimpatch also injects chemical meant to tem- porarily increase oxygen flow throughout the body Use of stim- patch will immediately allow character t0 recover from stun and reclaim Fatigue points. Additionally; character using stimpatch will apply 2 TN Modifier t0 any Knockout Checks Characters can gain the benefits from only one stimpatch at time The effects of stimpatch will wear off after 10 minutes_ An unconscious character can be awakened with stim- patch which requires only Simple Action_ However; the shock to the system means the character receives none of the other usual benefits of the patch:
ARTIFICIAL LImBS preindustrial times simple hooks pegs served replacement limbs: Now; prosthetic limbs perform all the func tions of the original limbs Despite advances modern medical technology; artificia limbs cannot be made stronger than the original limb. Although super-strong limbs can be constructed, the remaining natural  muscles the wearer" body cannot accommodate the high stresses_ Any character with Surgery Skill Bonus of 2 or higher can install Type artificial limb More advanced limbs are avail: able only in hospitals ad must fitted by doctor with Surgery Skill Bonus of 5 or higher Characters who receive artificial limbs must train for Six weeks to gain full use of the new limb. Actions attempted before the end of the training period are resolved as if the character [ still missing the limb_ using tne hit location rules see 121), artificia limbs sustain damage as they were natural Iimbs, losing function and being destroyed as usual by wound effects However; with the exception of Type 5: myomer replacement, damage to arti ficial limbs does not cause the character ay wound value ad
Medipack The medipack is small; thin box _ contoured t0 fit snugly to the thigh of MechWarrior aerospace pilot; It uses num ber of different medical sensors t0 constantly monitor the con- dition of the wearer: Based on those observations the medi- pack wli administer series of painkillers 0r stimulants help ing t0 keep the Wearcr alert and combat-ready. The pack can
